summary: Monorepo microservices behind Kong; Kafka for async; Redis for cache/rate limits; Postgres with RLS. Go Connectra satellite owns global contact/company search index.

api_gateway.name: contact360.io/api
api_gateway.role: FastAPI + Strawberry GraphQL; Postgres CRM; JWT; fans out to all satellites via HTTP clients

user_web_app.name: contact360.io/app
user_web_app.role: Next.js 16 App Router; GraphQL client to api.contact360.io; custom CSS design system

docsai_admin.name: contact360.io/admin
docsai_admin.role: Django DocsAI Admin; GraphQL to gateway for ops (users, jobs, billing); HTTP probes + health.satelliteHealth; static admin CSS

user_extension.name: Contact360 browser extension
user_extension.role: MV3 Chrome extension; Vite + React side panel; TypeScript service worker; content scripts <all_urls> with LinkedIn + opt-in generic capture; gateway extension.server (save-profiles, scrape); optional logs ingest; JWT via api.contact360.io GraphQL

satellites.name: connectra
satellites.role: Contact + company CRUD/VQL, OpenSearch indexing, CSV import jobs

satellites.name: email_server
satellites.role: Email finder, verification (mailtester/mailvetter), patterns, S3 CSV jobs, web-search

satellites.name: phone_server
satellites.role: Phone satellite (email-stack derived): verification, patterns, S3 CSV jobs, web-search; paths /phone

satellites.name: s3storage_server
satellites.role: Object storage + multipart CSV, metadata/sync jobs, analysis; Redis + Asynq; routes /api/v1

satellites.name: log_server
satellites.role: Log ingest/query, S3 CSV flush, worker TTL sweep; Redis + Asynq worker; default port 8091

satellites.name: extension_server
satellites.role: Sales Navigator scrape + save-profiles; Connectra POST /internal/extension/upsert-bulk; in-process pool; default port 8092

satellites.name: ai_server
satellites.role: Contact AI: HF chat, NL to VQL, Apollo URL parse, ai-chats API, Asynq worker; default port 3000

satellites.name: campaign_server
satellites.role: Multi-channel campaigns, sequences, templates, CQL search; Asynq worker; default port 9800
